eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: San Juan; Skagit; Whatcom, WA; at 01:05 PM ON MAR 5, 2026 Effective until 04:05 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Required Monthly Test This is a test, only a test of the Emergency Alert System in San Juan County, WA. If this had been a real emergency you would have been instructed what to do. The following tones will conclude this test. This is a test, only a test of the Emergency Alert System in San Juan County, WA.
